name: Container FCL 20ft, Lae -> Port Moresby
description_sale: Full container load (20ft) road haulage plus port handling from Lae to Port Moresby. Inclusive of gate-in and terminal handling. Price in PGK per move.

name: Container FCL 40ft, Lae -> Port Moresby
description_sale: Full container load (40ft) road haulage plus port handling from Lae to Port Moresby. Inclusive of gate-in and terminal handling. Price in PGK per move.

name: LCL per cubic metre
description_sale: Less-than-container-load consolidation. Charged per cubic metre. Includes origin handling and destination handling in POM. PGK per cbm.

name: Stevedoring per move
description_sale: Stevedoring labour and gear per container move (load or discharge). Price in PGK per move.

name: Tug assistance per hour
description_sale: Harbour tug charter per hour. Minimum 2 hours. Price in PGK per hour.

name: Port handling charge
description_sale: Standard port handling charge per FCL or per consignment. Includes documentation, gate pass, and yard fees. Price in PGK per consignment.

name: Container documentation fee
description_sale: Documentation fee per shipment covering customs form, terminal interchange, and Steamships export paperwork. Price in PGK per shipment.

name: Office lease per square metre per month
description_sale: CBD-grade office space. Long-term lease per square metre per month. Excludes service charge and outgoings. PGK per sqm per month.

name: Warehouse storage per day
description_sale: Bonded warehouse storage per pallet per day. Subject to availability. PGK per pallet per day.

name: Retail shop lease per square metre per month
description_sale: Ground floor retail shop lease per square metre per month in Steamships CBD malls. Excludes service charge. PGK per sqm per month.

name: Corporate accommodation per night
description_sale: Corporate rate single occupancy per night at a Coral Sea property. Includes breakfast and wifi. PGK per night.

name: Conference room half-day package
description_sale: Half-day conference package for up to 20 delegates. Includes room, projector, and morning/afternoon tea. PGK per half-day.

name: Catering package per person
description_sale: Lunch or dinner catering package per person. Buffet style with two mains and dessert. PGK per person.

name: JV partner logistics handling
description_sale: Joint venture logistics handling fee for shared distribution activities. Includes inbound consolidation and warehouse handling. PGK per shipment.

name: JV shared service administration fee
description_sale: Joint venture shared service administration fee covering finance, IT, and HR shared services. PGK per month per JV entity.
